name: Oracle Fusion AI
arrSource: Oracle Q3 FY26 commentary — Fusion AI bundled into SaaS apps; no discrete disclosure. Editorial estimate.

narrative.claimed: Fusion AI agents — bundled into Oracle SaaS apps; no discrete revenue disclosure
narrative.usage: Limited disclosure; small relative to OCI infra revenue
narrative.flags: Distinct from OCI infrastructure revenue. Oracle's AI footprint splits across Fusion AI (the SaaS apps line) and OCI AI infrastructure (the compute line), which sit in separate cohorts.
